chunk:
CHUNK:004/021
Most of them were ashore, hiking from Qassiarsuk to Tasiusaq to visit the Viking settlements, something I had planned to do ever since I discovered that it was the thing to do. But, like many residents of most countries, I never got around to seeing the tourist attractions or historical and cultural heritage sites in my own country. And besides, in Greenland, it wasn\u2019t as if you could just get in a car and drive. Getting around the country required various means of transport, good weather, and a lot of money. Cruise ships provided a more affordable means of seeing Greenland for visitors with relatively deep pockets. But having had one too many experiences on a cruise ship \u2013 the exciting and dangerous kind \u2013 I didn\u2019t plan on spending any recreation time on a cruise ship any time soon. Meeting Sean Arnet and his companions only compounded such thoughts as I slipped into the middle position allotted me by Gaba and followed Saarullik from deck to deck until we reached Arnet\u2019s cabin. Constable Ortusi Uiluiit greeted Gaba with a firm shake of the hand before talking him through the situation, assuring Gaba that all of Arnet\u2019s party were confined to their cabins, and the extra staff he could see standing two outside each door, were ship security. \u201cAnd a couple of cooks from below decks,\u201d Uiluiit added with a nod at two lean Asian cooks who could easily have been extras in a martial arts movie. \u201cAnd you removed all means of self-harm,\u201d Gaba said, framing it somewhere between a statement and a question. \u201cNaturally.\u201d Uiluiit swallowed, and I guessed that he hadn\u2019t made the connection between confining suspects to their cabins and holding them in custody. I caught his eye and gave him a sympathetic smile. To be fair, it was one thing to remember to take a suspect\u2019s belt and shoelaces before placing them in a holding cell, but each cabin no doubt had a small wardrobe of belts and laces, and anything else that might be used to hang themselves from the shower rail, not forgetting the shower curtain for the creatively inclined. \u201cAll right,\u201d Gaba said, clicking his fingers at Saarullik and Taateraaq. \u201cTake a cabin each, check they\u2019re still alive, and remove anything harmful.\u201d He clicked his fingers at me and said, \u201cYou\u2019ve got Rachael.\u201d \u201cGot it,\u201d I said, and followed Uiluiit\u2019s directions to Rachael Silk\u2019s cabin. The MP5 felt like overkill, but Gaba had insisted. I made the gun safe and cinched the sling tight to my chest before knocking on the door. The ship security guard, plus one musclebound cook, stepped to one side when Rachael called out for me to enter, and I opened the door. Rachael\u2019s perfume \u2013 something dark and musky \u2013 took me by surprise as I stepped inside the cabin. I pressed my fingers to my nose in an effort not to sneeze, before announcing myself and walking along the short section of hallway with the bathroom on my left. The cabin was L-shaped, and I found Rachael sitting at the end of her bed. She was taller than I imagined, with pale white skin, masculine good looks and a blond pageboy haircut. And, as I did a double take, I realised Rachael was also a man \u2013 younger than I had expected, and clearly struggling to come to terms with the situation. \u201cRachael?\u201d I said. \u201cYes?\u201d Rachael clearly identified as a woman and I had no intention of treating her otherwise, but her height and build encouraged me to observe a professional distance, just in case she decided to force her way past me and escape the confines of her cabin. Where she would go was a whole other matter, but I kept my distance, nonetheless. \u201cMy name is Constable Jensen. I\u2019m with the Greenland police.\u201d \u201cAnd so is your coworker,\u201d she said, brushing her hair to one side and revealing a bruise on her cheek. I paused for a second as I wondered if Uiluiit had been a little rough when he put Rachael and Arnet\u2019s companions in their cabins, but Rachael caught my eye and smiled. \u201cDon\u2019t worry, honey, it wasn\u2019t your boy who did this. I won\u2019t sue you if that\u2019s what you\u2019re thinking?\u201d \u201cI\u2019m not,\u201d I said, although I could already feel the pinch of my so-called curious frown and could imagine Atii standing in the corner of the cabin and rolling her eyes. It was always this way \u2013 curious frown followed by that part of me that always over invested in a case, often teasing at a thread that only got longer and longer the more I pulled on it. But before I could grasp it, Rachael pulled the thread for me. \u201cIt was Sean,\u201d she said. \u201cAnd I want to press charges.\u201d \u201cSean Arnet?\u201d \u201cYes,\u201d Rachael said. \u201cSean Augustus Arnet. Are there any other Seans aboard?\u201d I guessed there would be a few among the predominantly American passenger manifest, but left it at that, not wanting to put words into Rachael\u2019s mouth. I had entered the cabin to check she hadn\u2019t hurt herself, but Sean had apparently beaten me to it. \u201cWhat\u2019s up, honey? You look a little razzled.\u201d Razzled. Good word, but not one I was familiar with. I took a breath, ready to respond, only to pause as Gaba knocked on the cabin door and then entered, striding into the cabin but stopping short of the living area. \u201cConstable,\u201d he said, after giving Rachael a second look. \u201cA word.\u201d I nodded at Rachael, excused myself, and followed Gaba back into the corridor. He reached out to fiddle with the sling of my MP5 and then grunted when he discovered it didn\u2019t need adjusting. He tucked his hands into his vest and then dipped his head to look me in the eye. \u201cIt\u2019s confirmed. We have a positive I.D. on Sean Arnet.\u201d \u201cRight,\u201d I said, followed by a sigh when I understood what that meant.
compressed_context:
CTX: CRUISE-SHIP AROUND QASSIARSUK→TASIUSAQ  
OBS: TOURISTS HIKE QASSIARSUK→TASIUSAQ TO VISIT VIKING-SETTLEMENTS  
NOTE: GREENLAND ∧ NO-CAR-ACCESS ∧ TRANSPORT DEPENDS WEATHER ∧ COST↑  
INFER: CRUISE-SHIP→AFFORDABLE-GREENLAND-TOUR FOR WEALTHY  
JENSEN NOTES: AVOIDS CRUISE RECREATION ∵ PREVIOUS DANGEROUS-EXPERIENCES  
ACTION: GABA ∧ UILUIIT WALK DECKS→ARNET-CABIN  
AGENT: UILUIIT GREETS GABA; EXPLAINS ARNET-PARTY CONFINED CABINS  
DETAIL: SECURITY=2GUARDS/DOOR ∧ EXTRA-STAFF=2 ASIAN-COOKS  
GABA: "REMOVED-SELF-HARM MEANS?"  
UILUIIT: "NATURALLY."  
GABA ORDERS:  
  SAARULLIK CHECK-CABIN ∧ REMOVE-HARMFUL-ITEMS  
  TAATERAAQ CHECK-CABIN ∧ REMOVE-HARMFUL-ITEMS  
  JENSEN→RACHAEL-SILK-CABIN  
JENSEN ARMS MP5; SLING=CINCHED  
JENSEN KNOCKS; GUARD+COOK STEP-ASIDE  
OBS: PERFUME:DARK-MUSKY  
OBS: CABIN-LAYOUT=HALL L-SHAPE ∧ BATHROOM=LEFT  
OBS: RACHAEL SIT=END-OF-BED  
OBS: RACHAEL PALE-SKIN ∧ MASCULINE FEATURES ∧ BLOND-PAGEBOY  
OBS: RACHAEL BIOLOGICAL-MALE ∧ IDENTIFIES-FEMALE  
JENSEN: "CONSTABLE-JENSEN GREENLAND-POLICE"  
RACHAEL: "AND YOUR COWORKER TOO" ∧ REVEALS CHEEK-BRUISE  
RACHAEL: "DONT SUE YOU; BLAME=SEAN"  
RACHAEL: "SEAN BEAT ME ∧ I PRESS-CHARGES"  
JENSEN: "SEAN-AUGUSTUS-ARNET?"  
RACHAEL: "YES."  
ACTION: GABA KNOCKS ENTERS CORRIDOR  
GABA: "POS-ID=SEAN-AUGUSTUS-ARNET CONFIRMED"  
JENSEN: ACKNOWLEDGES ∴ SIGH
